title: Red and Green Tartan Ribbon with Gold Wired Edge, 63mm Wide x 9.2M Long, Beautiful Festive Christmas Ribbon, Ideal for Gift Wrapping Birthday Cake Presents Xmas Tree Decoration
features: Elegant Christmas Decor: Add a touch of festive charm to your holiday decorations with our Red and Green Tartan Ribbon. The gold wired edge allows for easy shaping and creates stunning bows on presents or tree trimmings
Premium Quality Ribbon: This 63mm wide and 9.2 meters long ribbon is made from high-quality materials, ensuring durability and a luxurious look for all your gift wrapping and decorating needs

Versatile Uses: Perfect for more than just Christmas, this tartan ribbon is ideal for birthdays, weddings, and other celebrations. Use it to wrap gifts, adorn cakes, or create beautiful bows for packages and decor
Easy to Shape: The wired edges make it simple to create intricate bows and shapes, staying in place throughout the holiday season without the need for constant adjustments

Complementary Colors: The classic red and green tartan pattern with gold accents complements a variety of Christmas color schemes, making it a versatile choice for both traditional and modern decor styles
